command:
import os
import psycopg2
from psycopg2.extras import RealDictCursor

url = (
    os.environ.get("DATABASE_URL")
    or os.environ.get("SQLALCHEMY_DATABASE_URL")
    or os.environ.get("POSTGRES_DSN")
)

url = url.replace("postgresql+psycopg2://", "postgresql://")

conn = psycopg2.connect(url)
cur = conn.cursor(cursor_factory=RealDictCursor)

print("===== TOP INVOICES BY LINE ITEM COUNT =====")
cur.execute("""
SELECT
    i.id,
    i.invoice_number,
    i.snapshot_account_number,
    i.snapshot_customer_name,
    i.total_payable,
    COUNT(li.id) AS line_count
FROM invoices i
LEFT JOIN invoice_line_items li ON li.invoice_id = i.id
GROUP BY i.id
ORDER BY line_count DESC, i.id
LIMIT 20;
""")
for row in cur.fetchall():
    print(dict(row))

print("\n===== LINE COUNT SUMMARY =====")
cur.execute("""
SELECT
    MIN(line_count) AS min_lines,
    MAX(line_count) AS max_lines,
    AVG(line_count)::numeric(10,2) AS avg_lines
FROM (
    SELECT i.id, COUNT(li.id) AS line_count
    FROM invoices i
    LEFT JOIN invoice_line_items li ON li.invoice_id = i.id
    GROUP BY i.id
) x;
""")
print(dict(cur.fetchone()))

cur.close()
conn.close()
